catalog_note: CVE index for RouterXPL-Forge modules. Cross-reference with NVD/CISA and vendor PSIRT for authoritative data.

entries.description: HTTP server for Cisco IOS 11.3 to 12.2 allows attackers to bypass authentication and execute arbitrary commands, when local authorization is being used, by specifying a high access level in the URL.
Module exploits Belkin Wireless G Plus MIMO Router F5D9230-4 information disclosure vulnerability which allows fetching sensitive information such as credentials.
Module exploits Belkin G and N150 Password MD5 Disclosure vulnerability which allows fetching administration's password in md5 format
Module exploits remote command execution in Linksys WRT100/WRT110 devices. If the target is vulnerable, command loop is invoked that allows executing commands on operating system level.
Module exploits Belkin N750 Remote Code Execution vulnerability which allows executing commands on operation system level.
Exploits shellshock vulnerability that allows executing commands on operating system level.
Exploits shellshock vulnerability that allows executing commands on operating system level.

entries.affected_versions: Linksys EA2700 < Ver.1.1.40 (Build 162751), Linksys EA3500 < Ver.1.1.40 (Build 162464), Linksys E4200v2 < Ver.2.1.41 (Build 162351), Linksys EA4500 < Ver.2.1.41 (Build 162351), Linksys EA6200 < Ver.1.1.41 (Build 162599)
entries.description: Exploit implementation for Linksys SMART WiFi Password Disclosure vulnerability. If target is vulnerable administrator's MD5 passsword is retrieved.
Exploit implementation for Misfortune Cookie Authentication Bypass vulnerability.

entries.affected_versions: TP-Link Archer C60, TP-Link Archer C9
entries.description: Module exploits TP-Link Archer C9 password reset feature by leveraging a predictable random number generator seed.
Module exploits remote command execution in Huawei Router HG532 devices. If the target is vulnerable, command loop is invoked that allows executing commands on operating system level.

entries.affected_versions: Cisco Catalyst 2960 IOS 12.2(55)SE1, Cisco Catalyst 2960 IOS 12.2(55)SE11
entries.description: Module exploits Cisco Catalyst 2960 ROCEM RCE vulnerability. If target is vulnerable, it is possible to patch execution flow to allow credless telnet interaction with highest privilege level.

entries.affected_versions: Netgear D6220, Netgear D6400, Netgear R6200v2, Netgear R6250, Netgear R6300v2

entries.affected_versions: Netgear DGN2200v1, Netgear DGN2200v2, Netgear DGN2200v3, Netgear DGN2200v4
entries.description: Exploits Netgear DGN2200 RCE vulnerability in the ping.cgi script.

entries.affected_versions: Netgear DGN2200v1, Netgear DGN2200v2, Netgear DGN2200v3, Netgear DGN2200v4, Netgear DGN2200v1 firmware prior to v1.0.0.60
entries.description: Exploits Netgear DGN2200 RCE vulnerability through dnslookup.cgi resource.
